MODULE_DESC_EROTIC: 情色內容模組 — 管理親密場景與角色慾望層級
EROTIC_UA_EROTIC_SCENE_DESC: True only when the current turn has explicit erotic contact or narration.
EROTIC_UA_LUST_TIER_DESC: 欲望層級：休眠/萌芽/悶燒/燃燒/貪婪。依浪漫、挑逗、身體接觸與情緒張力判斷；每回合最多升降一階。無親密能量則在一回合餘韻後冷卻；衝突、場景切換、明顯疏離可立即降溫。輸出精確層級字串。
EROTIC_UA_EROTIC_INTENSITY_DESC: Active erotic turns only. Integer 0-4: higher for explicit touching, oral/manual/intercourse, climax, or multiple involved NPCs.
EROTIC_DICE_UA_INSTRUCTION: When an erotic encounter involves uncertainty (seduction attempt, resistance, escalation), request a d20 roll with DC based on difficulty (easy=8, medium=12, hard=16).
MODULE_CONFIG_EROTIC_LUST_THRESHOLD_DESC: Lust tier index (0=休眠..4=貪婪) at which the erotic module prompt is injected.
MODULE_CONFIG_EROTIC_ESCALATION_THRESHOL: Lust tier index at which intensity score increases for model escalation.
MODULE_CONFIG_EROTIC_DEFAULT_DC_DESC: Default difficulty class for erotic dice rolls when UA doesn't specify.
MODULE_CONFIG_EROTIC_MAX_AFTERGLOW_DESC: Maximum turns the erotic prompt persists after deactivation.
MODULE_CONFIG_EROTIC_INTENSITY_THRESHOLD: eroticIntensity score at or above which the erotic module triggers model escalation. Default 6.
MODULE_CONFIG_EROTIC_COOLDOWN_ON_CONFLIC: Whether lust cools down when emotional conflict is detected.
EROTIC_PACING_NPC_INITIATIVE: 角色主動展現身體語言暗示或肢體接觸升級，測試玩家反應
EROTIC_PACING_ENVIRONMENTAL: 環境因素迫使角色與玩家身體接近（狹窄空間、跌倒、躲藏）
EROTIC_PACING_OPPORTUNITY: 私密獨處的機會出現，角色的態度根據好感度變化
EROTIC_QUEST_50: 角色需要在私密或脆弱的情境中信任玩家——涉及身體界線的考驗
EROTIC_QUEST_70A: 共同面對一個涉及親密與慾望的抉擇——角色的內心掙扎需要玩家的理解
EROTIC_QUEST_70B: 玩家必須主動接近角色，以言語或行動坦白自己對角色的渴望——角色需要感受到玩家真實的慾望而非曖昧試探
EROTIC_QUEST_90: 玩家詢問角色心目中理想的高潮體驗，並協助角色達到那樣的巔峰——這是雙方最深層的身體信任
